title: selaginella beitelii
intro: Selaginella beitelii, also known as the Beitel's spikemoss, is a species of spikemoss, a type of fern-like plant that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Selaginella beitelii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Selaginella beitelii can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
